docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,400.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DEMETRIUS PUCKETT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,400.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $280.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DEMETRIUS PUCKETT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,120.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
